original_text: I recently purchased the iPhone 17 Pro from Amazon, and the overall experience was excellent.The product arrived in perfect condition and performs exactly as expected. The build quality, performance, and camera are all top-notch, and everything was properly sealed and brand new.Delivery was prompt and smooth. Since this wasn’t an open-box delivery, I appreciated that the delivery associate reassured me that if anything turned out to be wrong, support would be available. That added an extra layer of confidence while accepting the package.I also managed to get a very good deal using coupons along with cashback through the ICICI Amazon credit card, which made the purchase even more worthwhile.Overall, a smooth buying experience and completely satisfied with the purchase. Highly recommended.
summary: 2. Summary: The reviewer had an excellent experience purchasing the iPhone 17 Pro from Amazon, with the product arriving in perfect condition and performing as expected, and they also appreciated the smooth delivery and additional savings from using coupons and a credit card. The reviewer is completely satisfied with the purchase and highly recommends it.

original_text: Very Premium feel. I do understand that apple left titanium body of 16 pro but yes it is an upgrade and if one has 16 pro then may be he should not go for this one but hugely recommend for anyone having 14pro or lower. Feels premium in hand and design is different and may not be to everyone's taste. Blue colour is awesome as I had liked darker colours from Apple. Camera is excellent. I do not want to comment about battery as I do not use this phone for gaming. Amazon also did a good job with respect to delivery and providing offers in Republic Day sale 😀😀.About durability I can only say that my wife is using 13 pro and it still is smooth and no major issues except battery which obviously Apple degrades over years so that you buy a new one.I was hoping to bag a 16 pro but in sale the difference was not huge so went with this one. 👍👍
summary: 2. Summary: The reviewer is extremely satisfied with their purchase, praising the phone's premium feel, design, and excellent camera, and also appreciates the service provided by Amazon, making it a highly recommended upgrade for those with older models like the 14pro or lower. They note that the phone may not be a necessary upgrade for 16pro users, but overall, they are very happy with their purchase.
